title: Tornado7
description: Track destructive tornadoes, drive custom intercept vehicles, and deploy probes to measure wind speeds and EF ratings!
body:
### **WE HAVE DISCORD**
[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/ntWXudBUPa) [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/ntWXudBUPa) [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/ntWXudBUPa) [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/ntWXudBUPa)
[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/ntWXudBUPa) [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/ntWXudBUPa)


This is the Stormchasers mod! For those who have long wanted to start intercepting tornadoes without clunky workarounds or stripped-down gameplay. If you are that kind of person, my mod gives you that opportunity! Several types of interceptors are available, and there will be more added over time. Tornadoes look beautiful without consuming a lot of PC resources! Excellent optimization and the best gameplay are guaranteed. Plus, crafting recipes are available for all items in the mod, making it fully survival-friendly!

**Mod Features and Keybinds**

Radar / Weather Map: You now need to craft or equip a Laptop from your inventory to open the radar!

**E** — Aim your cursor at the vehicle to get in.

**Q**— Deploy (anchor) the vehicle so you don't get blown away by the tornado!

**R** — Scan the tornado with a probe to get the wind speed and EF category (only works if the vehicle is deployed).

**L** — Turn on the headlights in your vehicle!

**Space** — Get out of the vehicle!

Main Mod Commands

The core command for the mod is /t7m:

_/t7m spawn tornado <ef0-ef6>_ — Command to spawn a tornado.

_/t7m spawn supercell_ — Creates a supercell that can spawn a random tornado!

_/t7m stop all_ — Instantly deletes all tornadoes.

_/t7m stop nearest_ — Deletes tornadoes within a 2000-block radius.

_/t7m aimtoplayer_ — Makes all tornadoes move toward your current position.

_/t7m list_ — Displays a list of all active tornadoes!
